column2: # General Yonezawa (2000) Ne calculator (full variance formula)
# Implements Eq. (5) and Eq. (6) from Yonezawa (2000).
stopifnot(nrow(T) == s, ncol(T) == s, length(D) == s)
stop("Recruitment sum(r_i) = 0; general formula undefined without newborns.")
u_dot   = u_dot,   u_bar   = u_bar,   over_u2 = over_u2,
S_i     = S_i,     A_i     = A_i,     r_i     = r_i,
Avr_S   = Avr_S,   Avr_Ad  = Avr_Ad,  V_delta = V_delta,
# NeStage API shim (falls back to compute_Ne_general when package not installed)
assemble_A      <- function(T, F) if (has_NeStage) NeStage::assemble_A(T, F)      else T + F
generation_time <- function(A)    if (has_NeStage) NeStage::generation_time(A)    else as.numeric(popbio::generation.time(A))
ubar            <- function(T, D) if (has_NeStage) NeStage::ubar(T, D)            else sum(D * colSums(T))
Ne_general      <- function(...)  if (has_NeStage) NeStage::Ne_general(...)       else compute_Ne_general(...)
res_Miz_general <- Ne_general(T_Miz, F_Miz, D_obs_Miz, L = L_Miz, a = 0)
res_Nan_general <- Ne_general(T_Nan, F_Nan, D_obs_Nan, L = L_Nan, a = 0)
